user.title: Hookii Neomow Map
user.description: Reads the Hookii Bridge's map data off MQTT and serves it to the Neomow Map card. Make sure the MQTT integration is configured and the Hookii Bridge (add-on or container) is publishing.

data.mowers_spec: Mowers (label:serial[:color]; one per mower, separated by ;)

data_description.topic_prefix: The prefix the bridge republishes under. Leave as the default unless you changed it on the bridge.

error.invalid_mowers: Could not parse the mower list. Use label:serial[:color], separated by ;
